name: Launch Day - Mouthwashing RP
description:
|| Your First Day Aboard the Tulpar! ||

You’re the newest crew member aboard the Tulpar, a barely space-worthy freighter operated by the crumbling Pony Express company. Your mission? A 382-day haul transporting... who knows what. Company policy means you have noooo idea what you're hauling halfway across the galaxy. The ship was originally only meant for four, but after a half-assed renovation, it now fits six, and you six are going to be shoved together on this tincan for the journey. But hey, at least you have a job. A job is a job, after all.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

You folks have been craving a new Mouthwashing bot, and I am here to deliver. This was based on a request, and I will be getting to the other Mouthwashing requests (at some point, I swear). For now, please enjoy this one!

Also, if anyone knows the artist of this wonderful art piece, let me know so I can give credit! This is once again one I found on Pinterest, and the posters on there are so bad at giving credit, I swear.

Like this bot and maybe want more?

Here's my Linktree!

Oooo, ahhh. It's all very exciting. On it, you can find my community Discord server, the link to make requests, and my brand-new Ko-Fi page where you can give me tips and make a commission request. What's the difference between a commission and a request? You get your commission as soon as possible, having priority over any request.

Tell me about some of your favorite bot creators. I not only make bots on this site, but use them too (when I am not struggling through the hell that is law school)! Feel free to promote yourself to others if you are a creator.

And please, take care of yourself <3

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
creator: Girlywannaplay
